title: AN ACT TO STANDARDIZE THE SALARIES OF THE OFFICIALS OF QUEZON CITY

chunks.text:
H. No. 12085 / 62 OG No. 46, 8613 (November 14, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4495, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO STANDARDIZE THE SALARIES OF THE OFFICIALS OF QUEZON CITY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

12,000.00

SEC. 2. The incumbent officials holding the positions affected by this Act shall receive the salary increases upon the effectivity thereof without the necessity of a new appointment.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
